reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the institution where Jack M. Guttentag is a professor emeritus of finance.
2. Determine whether that institution was established in 1881 through a donation and return the matching institution name.
original_final_question: Which of the university at which Jack M. Guttentag is a professor emeritus of finance was established in 1881 through a donation? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: At which school is Jack M. Guttentag a professor emeritus of finance? Evidence: Jack M. Guttentag: Jack M. Guttentag (born December 9, 1923) is a professor emeritus of finance at the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania. -> Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania

Node 2: Which school established in 1881 through Joseph Wharton's donation matches that institution? Evidence: Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania: The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania ( ; also known as the Wharton School or simply Wharton) is the business school of the University of Pennsylvania, a private Ivy League university located in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Wharton was established in 1881 through a donation from Joseph Wharton and is the world’s first collegiate school of business. -> Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania
Final answer: Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania
